query:
INSERT INTO subscriptions (client_id, project_id, stripe_sub_id, plan_name, status, current_period_end) 
                     VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'Monthly Pro', 'active', NOW() + INTERVAL '1 month')
                     ON CONFLICT (stripe_sub_id) DO UPDATE SET status = 'active', current_period_end = EXCLUDED.current_period_end
